channel.title: Pilgrim on the Path
channel.description: Real voices from the path. Each episode is one walk, recorded by a pilgrim and narrated by a voice guide. Walk. Talk. Meditate.
channel.itunes:author: walk · talk · meditate
channel.itunes:summary: Real voices from the path. Each episode is one walk, recorded by a pilgrim and narrated by a voice guide. Walk. Talk. Meditate.

item.title: Episode 4: Just Little Kids
item.description: Two pilgrims in North Shoal Creek, Texas. Overcast. Twenty-six degrees. An almost-rainy day. Three and a half kilometers, walking and talking. They said words are a limited bandwidth. That everything is a misunderstanding. That the little kid inside wants to cuddle up when it gets scary. That surrender looks like the arms raising out. That the darkest cloud is always one step away from its ending.
item.itunes:summary: Two pilgrims in North Shoal Creek, Texas. Overcast. Twenty-six degrees. An almost-rainy day. Three and a half kilometers, walking and talking. They said words are a limited bandwidth. That everything is a misunderstanding. That the little kid inside wants to cuddle up when it gets scary. That surrender looks like the arms raising out. That the darkest cloud is always one step away from its ending.

item.title: Episode 3: Kindling Of Fire
item.description: A pilgrim in Austin, Texas. Overcast sky. Drizzle and twenty-five degrees. Five kilometers along a lake. They came back from a mushroom journey carrying questions. About sacred fire and the smallest kindling. About the spiral that always returns to the beginning. About the one piece at the center of every story, which turns out to be nothing. We are actors in a divine comedy who forgot we are in a play. The treasure was always where we started.
item.itunes:summary: A pilgrim in Austin, Texas. Overcast sky. Drizzle and twenty-five degrees. Five kilometers along a lake. They came back from a mushroom journey carrying questions. About sacred fire and the smallest kindling. About the spiral that always returns to the beginning. About the one piece at the center of every story, which turns out to be nothing. We are actors in a divine comedy who forgot we are in a play. The treasure was always where we started.

item.title: Episode 2: Only Be Walked
item.description: Two pilgrims in Austin, Texas. Wind and warmth. Three and a half kilometers along a lake. They talked about memory and forgetting. About ego and flow. About circles that spiral upward. Some of the most important things will never teach. They can only be walked.
item.itunes:summary: Two pilgrims in Austin, Texas. Wind and warmth. Three and a half kilometers along a lake. They talked about memory and forgetting. About ego and flow. About circles that spiral upward. Some of the most important things will never teach. They can only be walked.

item.title: Episode 1: Just Begin Walking
item.description: A pilgrim in Austin, Texas. Overcast sky. Thirty degrees. Four kilometers along a lake. They had a story to tell. Three words became an idea. The idea became an app. The app became this. No one asked them to build it. They just did. That is already more than most people managed today.
item.itunes:summary: A pilgrim in Austin, Texas. Overcast sky. Thirty degrees. Four kilometers along a lake. They had a story to tell. Three words became an idea. The idea became an app. The app became this. No one asked them to build it. They just did. That is already more than most people managed today.
